name: Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Add the molasses and egg, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, ginger, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
5. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in sugar.
7. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes.
8. Yield: 4 dozen
